name: Lauren Hitt
subject: Re: Not great news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria won’t stop fighting, but with a new opponent already jumping into the race, it's up to us to have her back.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210331-1986-header&t=1&akid=1986%2E2526796%2E9mRLjK)
I’m reaching out one last time before midnight to ask you to make a contribution to our campaign.
Contributions to emails like this one, from small-dollar, grassroots donors like you, ensure that Alexandria doesn’t have to spend her time fundraising and can instead focus on advocating for working people and creating systemic, policy-driven change.
[So, with just a few hours left before our deadline, will you make a $3 contribution right now to help us continue building our unprecedented movement for change?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8507?refcode=em20210331-1986&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1986%2E2526796%2E9mRLjK)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8507?refcode=em20210331-1986&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1986%2E2526796%2E9mRLjK)**
Alexandria won’t stop fighting for policies like raising the minimum wage, reimagining our immigration system, cancelling student debt, and passing the Green New Deal — **but with a new opponent already jumping into the race, it's up to us to have her back so she can stay focused on these priorities and more.**
[We’re down to the wire. If you’ve got her back, make a $3 contribution here now.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8507?refcode=em20210331-1986&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1986%2E2526796%2E9mRLjK)
Thank you,
Lauren Hitt
Communications Director
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210331-1986-footer&t=23&refcode2=1986_2526796_9mRLjK&akid=1986%2E2526796%2E9mRLjK)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=1986%2E2526796%2E9mRLjK) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=1986%2E2526796%2E9mRLjK) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=1986%2E2526796%2E9mRLjK)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=1986%2E2526796%2E9mRLjK)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=1986%2E2526796%2E9mRLjK). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

body:
| |
---
| | I wanted to check in one more time before midnight. Our End of Quarter deadline is just THREE HOURS away... and right now, we’re on track to fall just short of our goal.

[**Will you help change that?**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=e4762e6994&e=0b94e583bc)

Since I’ve been in the U.S. Senate, the Swamp and their allies in the media have attacked me. And countless corporations have refused to give me future donations.

All because I’ve stood for our conservative values and defended our way of life. And you know what — their attacks tell me that we’re making a difference!

But this deadline is a crucial test of our momentum. If we’re going to take our country back, we must stand strong together.

[**So, I’m asking you, if you haven’t already given, please pitch in $100, $50, or even just $5 before our deadline at midnight.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=0e9926c431&e=0b94e583bc)

Every donation makes a difference.

Senator Roger Marshall

Sent from my iPhone

|
---
| |
---
|

subject: Your name is not on the list
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
Mo Brooks is a proven conservative that will be a fearless fighter in the Senate.
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=3_31_eom_blast_eveni&n=1)
---

| Peter, I didn’t see your name on the list, is that a mistake? I just got one of the last reports from the Treasurer on who has donated to our end-of-quarter deadline and I did not see your name. I know you have my back, so I was surprised to see you not listed. Help my campaign meet our first end-of-quarter deadline by donating here now: [https://secure.winred.com/mobrooks/eoq-fundraising-march](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RlRNdg11ECgNlc5zVx2jX0bDDDfduQ4xUPcAedxbHdBTPMjeuSRqxa_m-HUT7qzLRY&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=3_31_eom_blast_eveni&n=2) I’m a fearless fighter in the House for proven conservative values. I’ll do the same in the Senate, with your support, to finish the border wall, protect gun rights, and drain the DC swamp. [The deadline for all donations is midnight tonight. Please consider donating before that. ](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RlRNdg11ECgNlc5zVx2jX0bDDDfduQ4xUPcAedxbHdBTHhlciZOFZ4hldzR8w5xJo8&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=3_31_eom_blast_eveni&n=3) Thank you for your support, Mo Brooks

It looks like the Democrats are about to steal an election - this time in Iowa. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlydhihd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts

name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: Fight HR1 Alone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090517:JEnb_zuvN:m:1:3206719985:406E89A2AFD0C03359DE6807EC666160:r "Headline") Peter: You may think Stacey Abrams is not a threat because she didn't win the Georgia race for Governor in 2018, but I'm here to tell you that if we don't stop her now, her meteoric rise in progressive circles has her well on her way to winning the White House within a matter of a few years. Stacey Abrams was determined to deliver 2 U.S. Senate seats to Democrats by hook or by crook and she did just that in January. Now that she's the darling of the left, she's taking her "voter registration" efforts national thanks to the support of the progressive millionaires and billionaires who are backing her efforts and gaining her support among tens of millions of voters. Meanwhile the liberals in Washington are doing their part by trampling on our rights as voters through their disastrous HR1 "For the People" proposal that reads like a communist manifesto. **Together, they could change the political landscape in America for generations - unless we stand up RIGHT NOW.** **[Someone needs to stand up to Stacey Abrams, and the New Journey PAC is on the ground already- all we need is your immediate support to get started.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090517:JEnb_zuvN:m:1:3206719985:406E89A2AFD0C03359DE6807EC666160:r "Someone needs to stand up to Stacey Abrams, and the New Journey PAC is on the ground already – all we need is your immediate support to
get started.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090517:JEnb_zuvN:m:1:3206719985:406E89A2AFD0C03359DE6807EC666160:r "Rush")My name is James Golden, but you may know me as Mr. Snerdley, call screener and producer for radio legend Rush Limbaugh. I worked for Rush for almost 30 years, and I learned a lot sitting beside a great man like him every day. I started the New Journey to make Black America Conservative Again. We are fighting the entire liberal racist establishment as they spend millions of dollars to steal ANOTHER election. **[We are seeking to open offices in Georgia to counter the Stacey Abrams machine, and we need you to stand with us and rush an EMERGENCY donation to this effort before it is too late.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090517:JEnb_zuvN:m:1:3206719985:406E89A2AFD0C03359DE6807EC666160:r "We are seeking to open offices
in Georgia to counter the Stacey Abrams machine, and we need you to stand with us and rush an EMERGENCY donation to this effort before it is too
late.")** **Stacey is a progressive hero, more powerful than AOC, and can do no wrong with the liberal media, even though she was under investigation for seeking to "aggressively" register "ineligible, out-of-state, or deceased voters" before the state's Jan. 5 Senate runoff elections.** None of that matters to liberals. Just take HR1, a bill that could be headed to President Biden's desk in a few WEEKS. This bill will DESTROY the American voting system and take away every protection we have against socialism, all at the stroke of a pen. None of it matters, so long as Democrats win. clean_body: "Headline" Peter: You may think Stacey Abrams is not a threat because she didn't win the Georgia race for Governor in 2018, but I'm here to tell you that if we don't stop her now, her meteoric rise in progressive circles has her well on her way to winning the White House within a matter of a few years. Stacey Abrams was determined to deliver 2 U.S. Senate seats to Democrats by hook or by crook and she did just that in January. Now that she's the darling of the left, she's taking her "voter registration" efforts national thanks to the support of the progressive millionaires and billionaires who are backing her efforts and gaining her support among tens of millions of voters. Meanwhile the liberals in Washington are doing their part by trampling on our rights as voters through their disastrous HR1 "For the People" proposal that reads like a communist manifesto. Together, they could change the political landscape in America for generations - unless we stand up RIGHT NOW. "Someone needs to stand up to Stacey Abrams, and the New Journey PAC is on the ground already – all we need is your immediate support to get started." "Rush"My name is James Golden, but you may know me as Mr. Snerdley, call screener and producer for radio legend Rush Limbaugh. I worked for Rush for almost 30 years, and I learned a lot sitting beside a great man like him every day. I started the New Journey to make Black America Conservative Again. We are fighting the entire liberal racist establishment as they spend millions of dollars to steal ANOTHER election. "We are seeking to open offices in Georgia to counter the Stacey Abrams machine, and we need you to stand with us and rush an EMERGENCY donation to this effort before it is too late." Stacey is a progressive hero, more powerful than AOC, and can do no wrong with the liberal media, even though she was under investigation for seeking to "aggressively" register "ineligible, out-of-state, or deceased voters" before the state's Jan. 5 Senate runoff elections. None of that matters to liberals. Just take HR1, a bill that could be headed to President Biden's desk in a few WEEKS. name: Grassroots Action
subject: Our voting rights are under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Grassroots PAC
body:
electgrassroots.org [electgrassroots.org]They don't want our voices to count
Early this morning, the Texas Senate voted for a sweeping bill that is pure voter suppression. Last week, it was Georgia attacking our right to vote.
Hi Peter,
In the 2020 election we saw exactly how important each and every vote is. The Republicans saw it too, and now they're setting out to make it as tough as possible to vote. From banning giving water to people in line at the polls to limiting early voting hours, GOP legislatures across the country are doing everything they can to cling to power. It's time to work to elect people who work for the voters, not big dollar donors. [secure.actblue.com/donate/electgrassroots?refcode=4121]
There are no off years in politics, and right now we're seeing that in action. So we must take action too. One of the ways we can combat these laws being passed by states is to make sure that the Senate passes the For the People Act to protect and reform our elections. Call your Senators and voice your support for voters' rights.
Our elected officials are supposed to work for us. When we make it easier for all eligible voters to cast their ballots, we can make that happen. Help us support candidates who work for the working class.
Chip in [secure.actblue.com/donate/electgrassroots?refcode=4121]Thanks for all you do,
Elisa Cardnell
Founder/Executive Director

Houston, TX 77266

clean_body: Friend, If the Democrats expand their Majority on November 8th, 2022, we think we will look back on yesterday's deadline as the one that would have made the difference. We missed breaking our record by $2,189. If we would have hit yesterday's goal, it would have given us the boost we need to keep Wisconsin red. It would have given us the extra resources to strategize and implement a grassroots campaign full of proud volunteers across the state of Wisconsin. And most importantly, it would have brought us one step closer to our goal of firing Chuck Schumer. Because it would have given us everything we needed, == We need $2,189 more, Friend, == == We need you to step up right now. If just ONE PATRIOT decides they are okay with the Biden administration eliminating jobs, destroying businesses, keeping schools closed, and opening our border, then our plan will not work out. == Please don't let this slip out of our hands, %%First Name%% Thank you, Team RonJon== PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: I hate losing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
House Republicans have fallen behind Nancy Pelosi's dark money fundraising machine and we've FAILED to close the gap.

**" the House Republican war chest nonetheless fell short of the DCCC's $25.9 million" - Washington Examiner**

Fellow Patriot,

That headline is really disappointing to read.

House Republicans have fallen behind Nancy Pelosi's dark money fundraising machine and we've **FAILED** to close the gap.

That's right, we missed our goal and have now fallen dramatically behind the Democrats' fundraising numbers.

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: re: how’s Biden doing?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090866:JnLeezuhN:m:1:3206719985:8F20C42C489D80381B1262382916933F:r) **WE 'RE JUST GETTING STARTED** _It 's time to stand by battle-tested conservatives like Sarah Huckabee Sanders to help hold-the-line against liberal radicalism!_ [**SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090867:JnLeezuhN:m:1:3206719985:8F20C42C489D80381B1262382916933F:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090867:JnLeezuhN:m:1:3206719985:8F20C42C489D80381B1262382916933F:r) Peter, with just a few short months in office, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have made it clear they're saying goodbye to the "America FIRST" agenda of President Trump.
* They're reentering terrible international agreements
* They're welcoming caravans of illegal immigrants through our southern border
* They've nominated literal socialists to the cabinet
* They've canceled the Keystone XL and they've turned the COVID relief bill into a far-left wish list

And it's Americans like us who have to deal with the fallout! The only way to defend against these radical policies is to stand up where it counts: in the states - against the disastrous Biden-Harris policies! _As Governor of Arkansas, I will be the last line of defense against these attacks on our freedom, and I won 't back down. Today, I'm asking you to stand with me by contributing to my campaign: _ **By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:** [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090868:JnLeezuhN:m:1:3206719985:8F20C42C489D80381B1262382916933F:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090869:JnLeezuhN:m:1:3206719985:8F20C42C489D80381B1262382916933F:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090870:JnLeezuhN:m:1:3206719985:8F20C42C489D80381B1262382916933F:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090871:JnLeezuhN:m:1:3206719985:8F20C42C489D80381B1262382916933F:r) **If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.** You know me - I don't mince words. So here's the truth: Americans deserve better than what the radical Biden-Harris administration has to offer. And the only way we're going to make any progress is to lead in our home states, like I plan to do in Arkansas. _It 's not about doing what is politically correct, or about what's going to impress the Washington elite - it's about doing what's right for our country._ I know we need leaders who will not bow down to pressure or reinforce the status quo. I know we need leaders who will stand up to the radical mob and their allies in the media. _**Let me tell you, Peter, that leader is me. **_ I've been tested under fire, successfully managing one crisis after another in one of the most difficult, high-pressure jobs in all of government. And I'm ready to stand up to the radical Biden-Harris agenda. [**CHIP IN NOW TO SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090867:JnLeezuhN:m:1:3206719985:8F20C42C489D80381B1262382916933F:r) _**I believe strongly that we must reject the America LAST Biden agenda and stand strong for American values. **_ I will always:
* Defend your right to be free of socialism and tyranny
* Preserve your Second Amendment right to keep your family safe
* Stand by our police and uphold respect for law and order
* Protect your freedom of speech and religious liberty

As Governor, I will be your voice, and never let them silence you. Because I know it's hard-working Americans like you who make America truly great. I'm always going to stand up for you and keep our country free and prosperous. _And I want you by my side as I do it. _ [**JOIN SARAH NOW: CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090867:JnLeezuhN:m:1:3206719985:8F20C42C489D80381B1262382916933F:r) My dad always said the real test of a leader is not the way you handle the issues you know are coming - it's rising to the moment in a crisis you can never plan for. I can say confidently I learned that lesson while I served President Trump in the White House. I was there at the table with President Trump confronting our most dangerous adversaries like China and North Korea. When we fought and won big fights on tax cuts, securing the border, and conservative judges. We endured relentless threats and attacks through it all. In fact, I was the first White House press secretary to require Secret Service protection because of a credible violent threat against me! **But we never lost focus on the most important thing: getting the job done.** That's exactly what we need to do in every state right now. And I plan to do it myself as Governor. Please, chip in now to support my effort to serve. _**[CHIP IN NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090867:JnLeezuhN:m:1:3206719985:8F20C42C489D80381B1262382916933F:r)**_ Peter, I believe we will succeed in making a better future, but only if we hold the line against the attacks on our freedom and push forward with fresh ideas under a new generation of leadership. **And though my opponents will do everything in their power to destroy me, I will NOT apologize for who I am or who I am fighting for.** **I hope you choose to become a FOUNDING MEMBER of my campaign making an immediate donation now:[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/action-2108988/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090867:JnLeezuhN:m:1:3206719985:8F20C42C489D80381B1262382916933F:r)** Thank you for your time, Peter. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57090867:JnLeezuhN:m:1:3206719985:8F20C42C489D80381B1262382916933F:r) Sarah Huckabee Sanders |
---
---

Corporate contributions are not permissible.

Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

subject: MISSING: Have you seen this person?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee 1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004
body:
Border Czar Kamala Harris has been missing for 8 days.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9325540/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTkzMjU1NDA%3d&x=349d120b)

[](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9325540/224717773/197036/2/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=5e280b9e)
**LAST SEEN IGNORING BORDER CRISIS**
******[DEMAND TRANSPARENCY](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9325540/224717773/197036/3/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=6e6a4942)******
** **
Since Biden and his handlers put "President Kamala" in charge of the border "challenge" she's been M.I.A. [**Kamala hasn 't held a single press conference on the crisis, visited the border, or allowed the press access to cover the severity of the crisis.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9325540/224717773/197036/4/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=2d54ee8a)
[**Add your name to demand answers from the White House:**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9325540/224717773/197036/5/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=a377b953)

** **
Americans are left without leadership and border states have been abandoned without a plan. Meanwhile, the Biden-Harris administration is using your tax dollars to put migrants up in hotels, provide in-person learning to non-citizens before Americans, and cut stimulus checks for those here illegally.

We need answers NOW.

Thank you for standing up.

Team RSLC
** **

name: Mike
subject: DEMOCRACY ALERT: Dems to destroy the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The Democrats are moving fast pushing forward an agenda aimed at DISMANTLING President Trump's legacy. We need YOUR help to stop them!

As you are well aware, just a few years ago Senate Democrats applauded and lauded the filibuster--which ensures neither party can ram legislation through the Senate undemocratically.

Well now the tables have turned. The Democrat Party has changed its tune and **Chuck Schumer is moving at break-neck speed to eliminate the filibuster.** [**Pledge a donation today to defend democracy and protect the filibuster!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rJv9jD48RViO6z0xi00z8cY2XZWWt4C4clRAimMGS8PCTB-bzXSn2_q8zMDD5fjk4svWPLMNasH17p-KXg2kZVKyD2kdJL0KYSLNbm9tFLGk7plfzlT-P8pSCe2QT_ineOjInOMCxaNJPYO0jxBFN_Q6KcftW-JbtaUKpU33wBSLS9xBe2mgPdWBVExCFUtMo4YvE1KUtjVS1TmkEOOU6vFbjQybJ4Itlg471nP5sesWAxBsuPIhdSPZ0JOp1jfujuYL-Cq43jXmitVJpYIrt8-QQVfMfeeUCcHkv9pQA_ne9iuNYvzuj3-aXY5cAr9CR8QuY9lgMzcJCMlQdaQ8R3hERTqKW13i0R2dFPTLGnbJbe0lVt4OGwEE39ykx6CzowwUh1YlVzHlk_SFkYnSL1Z0jkl4F0_Vj8rBfIuUl8nLbJwpjF-bBcL-EonrZSFg&c=461ayEP3sbKnCKTUbhxrlhWwPxJXpJ27gb9Vs2y5cyvmeNdTG56Vag==&ch=GLyBIARv2I7tUqWME49bfMCVm1xqzqvTCj85hoEhmE7BraeFOLJCgQ==)

Destroying the filibuster would mean a FLOOD of laws that will take away your most beloved freedoms. They'll undo all policies that Trump and Republicans work hard to pass.
_****_

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Banned and in a bind . . .
body:
This week, I got an email from Stripe, my donation payment processor . . . and they banned me.
| | | | Friend,

[](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-419633-985472-5511809-415e88a445-ab4e21f8ff) This week, I got an email from Stripe, my donation payment processor . . . and they banned me.

If you recall, Stripe also recently banned President Donald Trump.

Stripe is giving me just a few weeks before they shut down my account.

So now I’m in a scramble to find another provider, transition data, and update my site.

[**Can you please chip in $20 before they kill my account for good?**](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-419633-985472-5511809-415e88a445-ab4e21f8ff)

Now, I’m banned by Paypal, Venmo, GoFundMe, CashApp and Stripe and it’s a clear attempt to cut off my sources of revenue so I’m forced to find a new profession . . . but that’s NOT happening!

[**Help me transition with a $20 gift today.**](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-419633-985472-5511809-415e88a445-ab4e21f8ff)

It’s no coincidence that I was banned by Stripe immediately following my testimony at the Florida State Capitol where I SPECIFICALLY briefed lawmakers and asked them to include financial institutions and payment processors in their proposed legislation to stop Cancel Culture.

While Big Tech thinks I’ll give up and go away, all these bans do is give me more focus and more evidence to push for effective change to stop discrimination against conservatives.

But for now, I have to find a way to keep going, so please, if you’re able, [**help me out with a donation of whatever you can afford**](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-419633-985472-5511809-415e88a445-ab4e21f8ff).

I’ll be back up and running soon, but it’s going to cost me a few thousand dollars to move everything over.

If you can help out in anyway, I would really appreciate it.

Thanks so much.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

body:
Can you take a look? It'll be short I promise
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x7btRbJLm62yw_zXacqiiaPd4-7MTSYA7PtMhy5LyeRQw7Wv_wzQYWX0sFUTtcENd3-npcfrWz0n2NVyjqseswqh2_v3qFjSybY4mqaaDT02vjY7Q1bA5Vpgb5Gmm7XuQBJKIXzfneTWH7jyCJmx9ErMf-4xgSKS_v0s-6Y-nuBlK-lZ7FqZZiAEPPqiEAFTBHja2MVluBtlOEUmfW_ZxXAA95UGRBLrAmjK1Ukk3j3UCZsNYmWFwhah1t9re-aVECg4oCA7jFpphlmgp27bS_RrmTDnyO-sVEXJ5pg4E_nK6rr1o9P7AyED0OlkQhFE2SLVY2y7LxcmUgEbpR5iuqvac5fyuxpvQaHejmtW4sK1EaP7sQSqkIEI99TvrOH6b4D2Ud9mFERG2cIsOvlySWLtnUpTmYJI4hDPR5-JV5if8yV1b2vhBA==&c=AQ4M2W3WV0JiH0yTJsg6fo1R8In-_mmn8HzYgUYMcYYP13kw3r3ssg==&ch=Y7D6aVAbnGsJnb5DPp0XuReRwlFLCcqE3VXaj-9XrSYoBQXovcR7LA==)
Hi Friend! It's Jane Jackson, Ronny's wife. I just talked to Ronny, and he had some bad news: **we missed our quarterly fundraising goal.** This could not have come at a worse time. It's so important that America First Trump Republicans are the future of our party, _**but if Ronny can 't make his fundraising goals, then that won't happen. **_ So he asked me to email you Friend, to tell you we're extending the deadline for just 24 hours. name: Sean Feucht
subject: New Court Case — Please Pray 🙏🏻
body:
Download and stream the New Orleans EP, and help spread the word of SALVATION from this city! | |
---
[](http://links.letusworship.us/u/click?_t=118560fb9cc044b69caacbae394b8c22&_m=f922de7aa3a34f139d86ae4f013a0ce8&_e=W78VHZvWywi6z9KLleyQJNThelpABLOCYiZmfrXh2HgbcUadBl8yiViUG0lI3tCZH2lXwhPZMD3WcfNr7K3Me8I5-3IXmz0E-dtQF7KPbNPTQzJr-Ib7P2-HfvQY4u79cNgI7EL-o9M9sB-XLXdiZxEPKwQ4qi6wBv5Ca_ItPsVGhWFxXvECmKyZ5k-qN4RLRfhZTcfGHAafhrAmJxt8-pIIVS2OAYdGjR8PydDKGvO-mMFZK4jbf3wishAdG3c8KUtQJlc9GQ39lltDTXlmaqfagEjCWkpJnFA2Kc3POC00TZr5ATi7HIptiHnrJakXBJqjN4NmjdKSgwYUPbgf-AwwMqQcoCQpPrDb9V_5on5lDCMWB1v2EmEbYSrDPRMx)

Dear Friend,
|
---
In Arizona, a state I LOVE, the Maricopa County government is coming after me.

This week, I received a court summons for “Failing to apply for a permit” — give me a break.

Whatever happened to religious liberty and the freedom to worship? Protestors can gather by the thousands and set fire to cities but the church is worthy of a criminal offense?

It is so fitting that during Easter week, and following the release of our amazing **[LetUsWorship New Orleans EP](http://links.letusworship.us/u/click?_t=118560fb9cc044b69caacbae394b8c22&_m=f922de7aa3a34f139d86ae4f013a0ce8&_e=W78VHZvWywi6z9KLleyQJNThelpABLOCYiZmfrXh2HgbcUadBl8yiViUG0lI3tCZH2lXwhPZMD3WcfNr7K3Me8I5-3IXmz0E-dtQF7KPbNPTQzJr-Ib7P2-HfvQY4u79cNgI7EL-o9M9sB-XLXdiZxEPKwQ4qi6wBv5Ca_ItPsWlCH-pMMO42wkQbLctEDczVzTWxW--Svx-SQ8rAqF8Shx7m3iZ4uL3EVmTAGj9fS1mbr5nslCuR8JE0YailVGfVInhTLIwSM4vOIVnAf262Z5p2eyM0TqPvzBA2Av0Jx6rxdEQFwDMos28IhA5OW6mcO-2gQXIDNFcyHCB7fRT8vszq4VoNnmGb3_n-BocvoqbsZ1eU9ZjfLT-mr4RahCp)** , the devil would launch such an attack.
Throughout the last year, as we’ve shared the Gospel and seen multitudes of miracles all across our nation, we have encountered roadblocks, but we have persevered, and GOD HAS BEEN FAITHFUL.

The government officials in Arizona have pretty strong evidence; LetUsWorship revivals in [**Prescott**](http://links.letusworship.us/u/click?_t=118560fb9cc044b69caacbae394b8c22&_m=f922de7aa3a34f139d86ae4f013a0ce8&_e=W78VHZvWywi6z9KLleyQJP2VEtjNPcjEjbR9yuOdxzEPmsHlMZBVnhCEXI6d6wpOWfzC3TUsKVEKYOaYcukkuifmdJHepNHSOnQxPYIFBrI8Py0q99j3dJUapWPFovwSkI3sXgChybHquEVvI15VC-jid4czwQ21EdhG8WW96Xfcp009EaiHhFHCuH-xYk_YE54dzjrS5ZY-SuR623mH-O1I4f6ZgYypTSivCmamyMTnkbw2b32dZLj1yrGarsWZiGIweblSC2e-OlkPevNON8nM0R3p9STY6K_pCRI1Lrk9K1_DcIcYEoP4bjx8B0A2kEUtSlFmJF8yHVMI_ICoYmaCrK1VpELsdLvZa0gwEoU9pVtGA_e_l0pNFig7UbvY), **[Mesa](http://links.letusworship.us/u/click?_t=118560fb9cc044b69caacbae394b8c22&_m=f922de7aa3a34f139d86ae4f013a0ce8&_e=W78VHZvWywi6z9KLleyQJP2VEtjNPcjEjbR9yuOdxzEJXmWcm6n26-EifIpG8VH8g0xf6cXlOsYx-QyzpO86ZpakxySCWaMoXuMp7TXWGJ0JvkVkwFKLCO9bnwYOAouV6Dv7Zw2FYw1FNOCEUooS-mBRypEhXuvfCxYkvVyDJO1dD-KMH2n4M0uxbum0Gsg1y26wNd1Os8t0x6WYMBTSBrtE3xLv1bvn8WKEmf2w7dCxrFtjEcsx-l8ZZNPFHLSid88fLo1bipA671S7fZAh_GDc2WrZ20R1DKVfuIE_--k8t36O8MEt11uXEWkArh4JDCE2JpW4hiuSLCf-CaqCq-4SHl03QfcJKsYg7ALTkiWGtaY3UINli_VcE8Iwk_ge)** , and **[Phoenix](http://links.letusworship.us/u/click?_t=118560fb9cc044b69caacbae394b8c22&_m=f922de7aa3a34f139d86ae4f013a0ce8&_e=W78VHZvWywi6z9KLleyQJP2VEtjNPcjEjbR9yuOdxzEX9skMTBCmNIq1iD3d2QyjG3OHOWGrJ2XR7tpVusgSr9zuyoIcr97sIhuvDbkeSxN5rk3WEq-RTT5UeSSlTpQv1sF5_pqWNeK7EZqoRo5FaTiRgNjvjY9AwCOYBrl5Wfoli-wIMzFCRG1flnS77X-b6YQ6MoYXIEjIQwZjEc6nxO4E7GlEM1a47w3mCl0HSVuvxgBp8Ij-a3Ves6OZ0fH4CAiCh_1rIY3yAh7vgNm31Q2lcqeWunNzG_NxqAbs4iAE36f7MYO2hv44apt3n7UrcD6y2w9OirJ1ghA7cq6oy2zrAKjEIFm8Uw6UWYC-z0i4BpSsHGJEOVsEt4KCPnRU)** were LIFE CHANGING.

WE LOVE ARIZONA and have seen God work POWERFULLY multiple times there.

Here are a few things you can do to help:
1) Pray for breakthrough & wisdom (we’ve got some great & Godly lawyers)
2) Join our newsletter, journey & donate at **www.letusworship.us**. We’ve got a killer documentary cooking about this whole journey but need your help!
3) Stand with us and HOLD THE LINE for our freedom to worship God! Make some noise to your Arizona reps, people!!
4) Pray for my wife and kids

We aren’t scared of government bureaucrats who are increasingly hostile towards the Gospel, and WE WON’T BACK DOWN!!
[**HELP US FIGHT BACK!!!**](http://links.letusworship.us/u/click?_t=118560fb9cc044b69caacbae394b8c22&_m=f922de7aa3a34f139d86ae4f013a0ce8&_e=W78VHZvWywi6z9KLleyQJNThelpABLOCYiZmfrXh2HiOt_aaySUD6EY7d7z4JE5BemHDpFvG4RQwWU5jPP6SUw3cgotgOWueaW6Hc_jIHMzA5GmJmJVnPKV03yH3EdMxfzFYYM1WprArzcR6k72p4aGDNQAwTKy0QBqI8ilXqvHIxT88t87yWC2Wd92IjCk9msGQUL0phYvtdw-kTIfP60HdVFcoHbjh2C73lHKc_lQMciLpTCYigky0QD6QrSFwVpE78kud9Gnb-V6DQRP6H04AG7wgTtNr92v7eeIs2Cy4jVJ3aSqT-jemI-HCPqyjCUuRi3XFjXgZ1GiNbmTGKRuJPc20O85QGGi05ZiVMVaRpaW6WoSfpOYUqK4yxV1G)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Happy Holy Week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
With tomorrow being Good Friday, I wanted to send out this week's Party Line a day early. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470374?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Happy Holy Week**_ With tomorrow being Good Friday, I wanted to send out this week's Party Line a day early. This has been a momentous week, capping off a momentous month for the State of Indiana. On Wednesday, all Hoosiers 16 and over became eligible to get a COVID-19 vaccine. From the beginning, Indiana’s vaccine rollout has been one of the—if not the—best in the nation. Governor Holcomb and his team correctly prioritized at-risk populations first and have over 500 vaccination sites open throughout the state. Now that all Hoosiers 16+ are eligible and statewide mask and venue capacity mandates are expiring, I’m excited for what the rest of spring and summer will bring for Indiana.

On Monday, I was in Evansville to manage the caucus to fill Holli Sullivan’s former District 78 House seat. Congratulations to Tim O’Brien on being the newest member of our Republican supermajority in the Indiana House of Representatives. My full statement on Tim’s election is below and I want to thank the entire Republican team in Evansville that executed a safe and healthy caucus this week.

Indiana is demonstrating what competent, conservative leadership can do for a state. When I see what is happening in Washington DC, I know we’re getting just the opposite from the capital. Biden, Harris, Pelosi, Schumer and the rest of the Democrats are drunk with power and are ramming through leftist policies that will raise our taxes, takeover our elections, weaken our borders, and destroy our energy independence. HR 1, the Orwellian titled “For the People Act,” is an effort by the Democrats to hijack state elections. On top of that, there’s a crisis of President Biden’s making at our border and the new administration is already talking about raising taxes... while we’re still in a pandemic. With these policies coming out of Washington just 3 months into Democrat control, it’s as clear as ever that we have to stay united as a Republican Party, do everything we can to win back the House and Senate in 2022, and win back the White House in 2024.

Thanks Kyle

_**Photo:** __State Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer talks with WISH TV's Phil Sanchez for an interview that aired earlier this week_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| _**Expanding Vaccine **_**_Eligibility_** On Wednesday**, Governor Holcomb** and the Indiana State Department of Health announced that all Hoosiers 16 years and older are eligible to be vaccinated. That means 5.4 million Indiana residents are now eligible! **Governor Holcomb** also announced that an [eight week mass vaccination clinic will open in Gary](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=16b6482f7f&e=1acd9bb3d6) on April 7th. This mass vaccination clinic has the capacity to administer 3,000 COVID-19 vaccines a day. Every time a Hoosier gets vaccinated, we get one step closer to beating COVID-19 in Indiana. To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6b01664272&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=abd60612b7&e=1acd9bb3d6), and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ea7de581fc&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

_**Photo:**_ _Celebrates Women's History Month with the Indiana Power Caucus_
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Good Friday**_ On Good Friday tomorrow please join us in remembering that Christ gave the ultimate sacrifice for all of us.
---
|
---
|
---
| _**HD 78 Caucus**_ Chairman Kyle Hupfer issued this statement following the selection of Tim O'Brien to fill the open seat in Indiana House District 78:
_**"Congratulations to Tim O’Brien on winning the caucus in House District 78. With Holli Sullivan serving as our new Secretary of State, Tim has big shoes to fill and I know he is up to the task. He has already compiled an impressive record of public service and I’m glad Tim is stepping up to serve once again in this new role." -Chairman Hupfer**_
---
| |
---
| _**COVID-19 Vaccine News**_ Governor Holcomb and the Indiana State Department of Health are continuing to lead one of the most effective vaccine rollouts in the nation. COVID-19 vaccine eligibility expanded again this week to include **_ALL HOOSIERS_** 16 and over.

To schedule your shot, call 211 or go to [ourshot.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fadfa076f3&e=1acd9bb3d6). [\--> Click here to register for your COVID-19 Vaccine <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=783ef4f779&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer Media****Appearances**_ On Sunday Chairman Hupfer appeared on [IN Focus with Dan Spehler](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=aa2d3e4dbb&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [All Indiana Politics with Phil Sanchez](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=80510ef567&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Chairman Hupfer IN Focus interview: [https://fox59.com/news/politics/in-focus-party-leaders-discuss-holcombs-speech-indianas-future/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=813e9f6ca8&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Chairman Hupfer All Indiana Politics Interview: [https://www.wishtv.com/news/allindianapolitics/all-indiana-politics-indiana-republican-democratic-party-chairmen/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=43c9c40ad5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**CollegeChoice 529 Surpasses 400,000 Accounts**_ Treasurer of State Kelly Mitchell has announced that the number of accounts in the state’s tax-advantaged CollegeChoice 529 education savings plans has surpassed 400,000. CollegeChoice 529 provides families with flexibility and choice when it comes to saving for education after high school. Funds can be used at any eligible school or qualified apprenticeship program.
_**“400,000 is another tremendous milestone in a program that has grown by leaps and bounds during my seven years in office. We continue to receive overwhelmingly positive feedback from parents and students around the state, and I am so proud of the work being done by the Indiana Education Savings Authority.” -Treasurer Mitchell**_
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[announces mass vaccination clinic in Gary](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9e45a0fe9a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[welcomes new State Rep. Tim O'Brien to Statehouse](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=91a5ea40c7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[meets with Gov. Holcomb to discuss Indiana's recovery](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3fbbd5cf21&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun **[urges Biden to visit the border to see the crisis firsthand](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4deeda9178&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[cosponsors bill to allow states to manage their own finances](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d293335db7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[honors Vietnam Veterans](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0e54de5feb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird **[sponsors Securing American Leadership in Science and Technology Act](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=116d3ca10c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz **[visits border and calls on Biden to take action](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d8f5935234&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence **[talks about telehealth and broadband](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c3967a52a1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[calls on Biden to address the border crisis](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ab9a407cea&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth**[wants Biden to address his border crisis](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=40d3669e95&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Rita Hart
subject: A note about the future of this contest (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
After many conversations with people I trust about the future of this contest, I have made the decision to withdraw my contest before the House Committee on Administration. |
---
Peter, After many conversations with people I trust about the future of this contest, I have made the decision to withdraw my contest before the House Committee on Administration. Before I tell you more about this decision, I want to say how deeply grateful I am for the time, work, and dollars you put into this campaign. **Thank you** for your support over the past two years, for believing in me and my campaign, and for being a part of what we built here in Iowa. This is not the end we had hoped or planned for, but we can be proud knowing we did everything we could together. Since Election Day, and throughout this entire process, my entire mission has been about ensuring the voices of Iowans who followed the law are not silenced. I am saddened that some Iowans’ votes will not count through no fault of their own. The work of ensuring it does not happen again will continue beyond this campaign. Despite our best efforts to have every vote counted, the reality is that the toxic campaign of political disinformation to attack this constitutional review of the closest congressional contest in 100 years has effectively silenced the voices of Iowans. It is a stain on our democracy that the truth has not prevailed, and my hope for the future is a return to decency and civility. I wish Mariannette Miller-Meeks all the best as she serves the people of this great state as Congresswoman. This has been a difficult process for all of those involved and it’s incredibly important that we work together to reform the system so this does not happen again in the future. **Running to represent the people of Iowa’s Second Congressional District in the U.S. House of Representatives has been one of the greatest honors of my life.** I got in this race to listen to the people of the district and bring your voices of common sense and decency to Washington, D.C. **Thank you for investing in this campaign -- whether you donated a few extra dollars, volunteered your time, or just cheered us on.** Your hope, generosity, and unending support made this campaign possible. I will always be grateful that you believed in me and the important work we did here. I am a life-long Iowan and I will always work for a more prosperous future for our children and grandchildren. That won’t change regardless of this, or any, election. We have so much more to work for. I hope you all will stay involved and join me in working to make Iowa a better place for all. All my best, -Rita

clean_body: After many conversations with people I trust about the future of this contest, I have made the decision to withdraw my contest before the House Committee on Administration. | Peter, After many conversations with people I trust about the future of this contest, I have made the decision to withdraw my contest before the House Committee on Administration. Before I tell you more about this decision, I want to say how deeply grateful I am for the time, work, and dollars you put into this campaign. Thank you for your support over the past two years, for believing in me and my campaign, and for being a part of what we built here in Iowa. This is not the end we had hoped or planned for, but we can be proud knowing we did everything we could together. Since Election Day, and throughout this entire process, my entire mission has been about ensuring the voices of Iowans who followed the law are not silenced. I am saddened that some Iowans’ votes will not count through no fault of their own. The work of ensuring it does not happen again will continue beyond this campaign. Despite our best efforts to have every vote counted, the reality is that the toxic campaign of political disinformation to attack this constitutional review of the closest congressional contest in 100 years has effectively silenced the voices of Iowans. It is a stain on our democracy that the truth has not prevailed, and my hope for the future is a return to decency and civility. I wish Mariannette Miller-Meeks all the best as she serves the people of this great state as Congresswoman. This has been a difficult process for all of those involved and it’s incredibly important that we work together to reform the system so this does not happen again in the future. Running to represent the people of Iowa’s Second Congressional District in the U.S. House of Representatives has been one of the greatest honors of my life. I got in this race to listen to the people of the district and bring your voices of common sense and decency to Washington, D.C. Thank you for investing in this campaign -- whether you donated a few extra dollars, volunteered your time, or just cheered us on. Your hope, generosity, and unending support made this campaign possible. I will always be grateful that you believed in me and the important work we did here. I am a life-long Iowan and I will always work for a more prosperous future for our children and grandchildren. That won’t change regardless of this, or any, election. We have so much more to work for. I hope you all will stay involved and join me in working to make Iowa a better place for all. All my best, -Rita | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . Rita Hart for Iowa P.O. Box 333 Wheatland, IA 52777 | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa

name: John Burke
subject: How is Governor Newsom doing?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Kevin Faulconer wants to know how you think Gavin Newsom is doing as our governor. Read more >>
Peter, _Has Gavin Newsom failed California?_ He’s been at the helm for over two years now, and in that time we’ve seen an explosion of homelessness, as well as a job-killing climate that has businesses and families leaving our state in record numbers. Even with the COVID-19 vaccines available, California is dead last in distribution. We’re still at the bottom of the barrel when it comes to education and getting our kids safely back into school. **There is a lot going on in the Golden State right now, and Kevin Faulconer wants to know how well you think our governor has been handling it.** Please take a quick moment to rate Gavin Newsom’s job performance as governor of California. [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ea89ae23f08de1ba/ed321867d7a962e7c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**RATE GOVERNOR NEWSOM >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ea89ae23f08de1ba/19bb38461287e82cc3d6b838967d376c/34943) Something needs to change in California, and now that we’re on the cusp of a recall election, hopefully it will happen sooner rather than later. It’s time for Kevin Faulconer, a proven leader, to begin a California Comeback! Thanks for your response,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ea89ae23f08de1ba/5339722ec1335062c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ea89ae23f08de1ba/93ca1225435aac59c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ea89ae23f08de1ba/a316ad369fd828f5c3d6b838967d376c/34943)
